ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client associated with the campaign */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform where the campaign is run */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the campaign ended */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., Active, Hold, Closed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the campaign was last updated */,
  "campaign_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Information about the target audience */,
  "campaign_goals" TEXT /* Specific goals and objectives of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., brand awareness, lead generation) */,
  "campaign_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy used for the campaign */,
  "campaign_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was last updated */,
  "client_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "client_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the client */,
  "client_industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "client_size" TEXT /* Size of the client's business (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "client_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform record was last updated */,
  "platform_url" TEXT /* URL of the platform */,
  "platform_api_key" TEXT /* API key for integrating with the platform */,
  "platform_api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for integrating with the platform */,
  "platform_status" TEXT /* Status of the platform (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the metric is associated with */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Click-through Rate, Conversion Rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was last updated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the budget is associated with */,
  "allocated_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "spent_budget" REAL /* Amount of budget spent so far */,
  "remaining_budget" REAL /* Remaining budget */,
  "budget_date" TEXT /* Date the budget was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the budget record was last updated */,
  "budget_type" TEXT /* Type of budget (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "budget_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_changes" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign the status change is associated with */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the campaign */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the campaign */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status change occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status change record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status change record was last updated */,
  "change_by" TEXT /* User who made the status change */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_changes_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Account Manager, Analyst, Client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_campaigns" (
  "user_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-campaign association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campaign */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user for the campaign (e.g., Manager, Analyst, Viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-campaign association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-campaign association was last updated */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "user_campaign_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user-campaign association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaigns_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_campaigns_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
